title: Session todos section with drag-and-drop reordering and completion tracking
purpose: Manages a section for displaying and editing session todos with features like adding, editing, deleting, toggling completion, clearing completed items, and drag-and-drop reordering.
module_context: Exports a forward-ref component SessionTodosSection that manages session todos using Zustand store and API calls, with a nested TodoRow component for individual todo rendering and editing.

steps.content: Render a todo item with checkbox for completion toggle.
Display todo text in either read-only or edit mode based on editing state.
Allow editing todo text by clicking on it or using input field.
Provide delete functionality with hover visibility.
Support drag-and-drop operations for reordering todos.
Handle optimistic updates and API calls for todo toggling, editing, and deletion.
Prepare the next state for the todo by toggling its completed status.
Update the todo in the store with the optimistic next state.
Send a PATCH request to update the todo on the server.
IF the server update fails, revert the store to the original state.
Log any errors that occur during the toggle operation.
Trim the draft text and exit editing mode.
IF the trimmed text is empty or unchanged, do not proceed with update.
Update the todo in the store with the optimistic new text.
Send a PATCH request to update the todo text on the server.
IF the server update fails, revert the store and input to original state.
Log any errors that occur during the edit operation.
Capture a snapshot of the current session todos before deletion.
Remove the todo from the local store.
Send a DELETE request to remove the todo from the server.
IF the server deletion fails, restore the todos from the snapshot.
Log any errors that occur during the deletion operation.
Initialize state and store selectors for session todos and related data.
Set up refs and state for drag-and-drop operations and UI visibility.
Define the revealAddInput function to show and focus the add input field.
Use imperative handle to expose revealAddInput to parent components.
Sort todos by order and filter based on show completed setting.
Render the section header with toggle and count.
Render the todo list with show completed toggle and clear completed button.
Render the add input field for new todos.
Set the add input visibility to true.
Focus the add input field after a brief timeout.
Validate that a session is active and the input text is not empty.
Clear the input text after validation.
Send a POST request to create a new todo on the server.
IF the server creation fails, restore the input text to its previous value.
Log any errors that occur during the add operation.
Store the dragged todo ID in a ref.
Set the drag effect allowed to move.
Prevent the default drag over behavior.
Set the drop effect to move.
Update the drag over ID to highlight the drop target.
Prevent the default drop behavior.
Mark that a drop occurred.
Check if a drop occurred and reset the drop flag.
IF no drop occurred, reset drag state and return.
Determine the from and to IDs for reordering.
IF session or IDs are invalid, return without reordering.
Calculate new order IDs based on drag positions.
Update the store with the optimistic reordered todos.
Send a PATCH request to reorder todos on the server.
IF the server reorder fails, revert the store to the original state.
Log any errors that occur during the reorder operation.
Validate that a session is active.
Close the confirmation dialog.
Filter out completed todos from the store.
Send a DELETE request to clear completed todos on the server.
IF the server clear fails, restore the todos from the snapshot.
Log any errors that occur during the clear operation.
